# EVERLIGHT VENTURES -- MASTER SITE COPY
# everlightventures.io | Lovable Build Guide

This file contains ALL page copy for every tab/section of the main site.
Paste each section into Lovable as you build. Design notes included per section.

SITE STRUCTURE:

  /him-loadout ..... HIM Loadout (affiliate gear)
  /logistics ....... Everlight Logistics (shipping)

GLOBAL DESIGN SYSTEM:

  Text Primary: #F5F5F5
  Text Muted: #A0A0A0

## THE BUILDER BEHIND IT (About)

Everlight Ventures started with one idea: stop waiting for permission.

What began as a logistics company grew into a portfolio of real
businesses -- each one built from scratch, funded internally, and
operated with the same core principle. Move fast. Stay lean. Ship product.

The ventures span industries because the skill set does. Commerce,
software, publishing, logistics -- different markets, same playbook.
Find the gap. Build the solution. Scale what works. Kill what doesn't.

This is not a fund. This is not a holding company collecting logos.
Every venture under the Everlight umbrella is actively operated,
actively growing, and built to last.

Everlight Logistics LLC is the legal entity behind the portfolio.
Headquartered in the U.S. and built for the long game.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

## FOOTER

Everlight Ventures -- Building what matters.

## WHAT WE DO

E-COMMERCE FULFILLMENT
End-to-end order fulfillment -- pick, pack, and ship -- integrated
with your storefront. Shopify, WooCommerce, and custom API supported.

LAST-MILE DELIVERY SOLUTIONS
Fast, trackable delivery to your customer's door.
Regional carrier partnerships and route optimization
keep costs low and delivery windows tight.

WAREHOUSE MANAGEMENT
Scalable storage with real-time inventory visibility.
Climate-controlled options, barcode tracking, and
cycle counting to keep shrinkage at zero.

SUPPLY CHAIN CONSULTING
We audit your current logistics stack and build a plan to cut costs,
reduce transit times, and eliminate failure points.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

## WHY BUSINESSES CHOOSE US

SPEED -- Two-day fulfillment standard. Same-day processing on orders
received before 2 PM PT. No backlogs, no excuses.

RELIABILITY -- 99.8% order accuracy rate. Every package scanned,
verified, and tracked from warehouse to doorstep.

TECHNOLOGY-DRIVEN -- Real-time dashboards, automated reorder alerts,
and API-first integrations.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

## HERO

EVERLIGHT VENTURES PUBLISHING
Stories That Stay With You

We believe that a great story does more than entertain. It changes
the way you see the world, the way you see yourself, and the way
you raise the people who come after you.

Everlight Ventures Publishing is the storytelling arm of Everlight
Ventures -- a small, independent house producing literary fiction,
genre-defying thrillers, and children's books built on the Science
of Reading. Every title in our catalog is written with intention,
produced with care, and designed to outlast the season it was
published in.

Visual: Premium still life -- stack of hardcover books on dark wood,
soft warm light from left, single reading lamp glow. Boutique
publisher aesthetic. No text overlay.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

## BEYOND THE VEIL (/publishing/beyond-the-avels)
The Hailey Pink Chronicles | A Quantum Western Thriller
Badge: COMING SOON -- 2026
Accent: Deep amber (#D4871C)

She escapes her bruises every night by leaving her body behind.

Deputy Hailey Pink is trapped in a dying Western town where the
sheriff dismisses her warnings, and the man waiting for her at home
speaks with his fists before his words. But when Hailey closes her
eyes and sleeps, she flies. In the astral realm she is untouchable --
soaring over floating islands of liquid light, swimming ancient oceans
alongside creatures older than memory.

But something is following her there. A shadow. A presence. A dark
and ancient rage that does not belong to this world, or any other she
has ever known. When the people of her town begin drifting through
the streets like hollow shells -- a sickness no doctor can name, a
silence that feels like something feeding -- Hailey starts to
understand. The astral realm is not a dream. It is real. The worlds
are connected.

The truth is stranger than any ghost story: the entity is not a
monster. It is a man in another dimension who does not even know he
is doing it. His unresolved anger, his consciousness leaking across
the quantum web, poisoning her world like a slow and invisible plague.
To stop him, Hailey will have to become something the frontier has
never seen -- a warrior of the mind, a healer of broken dimensions,
and a woman willing to pay the ultimate price.

"The real battle will be fought inside you."

Target: Adults 18+, fans of Cormac McCarthy meets Murakami,
Westworld meets Avatar
[Join the Waitlist -- Be First to Read] [Read Chapter One (Free)]

Cover art: Female figure in duster coat and deputy badge, standing at
boundary between two worlds. Left: dusty Western street. Right:
luminous astral landscape of floating islands and cosmic ocean.
Threads of golden light stretch into infinity.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

## THE SILENT WITNESS (/publishing/tsw)
A Detective Kiara Estrella Novel | A Mystery Thriller
Badge: IN DEVELOPMENT
Accent: Steel blue (#4A6FA5)

Detective Kiara Estrella grew up watching crime tear her Chicago
neighborhood apart. The robbery she witnessed at ten years old left
a neighbor dead and left her with a question she has spent her entire
life trying to answer: what does justice actually look like when the
system that is supposed to deliver it is broken from the inside?

Now a decorated homicide detective, Kiara catches a case that will
test everything she believes. An environmental activist is found dead
in the wreckage of a factory fire that was no accident. The victim
had enemies -- powerful ones -- and the trail of shell companies,
laundered money, and silenced witnesses leads straight to the most
protected office in the city.

The Silent Witness is a mystery thriller about corruption, community,
and the cost of doing what is right when every institution around you
is designed to make sure you fail. It is a story about a woman who
refuses to look away -- and the people who will do anything to make
sure she does.

Target: Adults 18+, fans of Tana French, Michael Connelly, Attica Locke
[Get Notified at Launch] [Meet Detective Estrella]

Cover art: Woman in tailored blazer, back to viewer, facing
rain-soaked Chicago street at night. Reflected in wet pavement:
faint outline of a burning factory. Noir atmosphere, deep blues
and amber streetlight reflections.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

## EVERLIGHT KIDS (/publishing/everlight-kids)
An Everlight Ventures Imprint
Badge: LAUNCHING 2026
Accent: Warm gold (#E8B84B) + soft green (#5DAE72)

"Every word is a door. And every door is an adventure."

Everlight Kids is where stories teach without trying and adventures
build readers from the ground up.

Our flagship series, Adventures with Sam and Robo, follows a curious
boy named Sam and his robot best friend Robo on a five-book journey
through the foundations of reading, science, emotional intelligence,
and character. Each book introduces a new phonics progression -- from
first CVC words to reading fluency -- woven directly into the
adventure so children learn to read the way they learn everything
else: by doing something they love.

Every Everlight Kids book is an interactive coloring hybrid. The left
page is a black-and-white illustration for coloring. The right page
is the same scene in full color. Two books in one. Story time and
activity time in a single product.

CHARACTER SPOTLIGHT: SAM AND ROBO
Sam is a curious, adventurous boy who discovers a magical book under
an old oak tree. Out pops Robo -- a small, friendly robot with kind
eyes and a glowing display screen. Together, they rescue animals,
explore science labs, solve mysteries, protect the environment, and
discover that the greatest superpower of all is the one you share
with others.

Target: Children ages 3-8, parents, teachers, homeschool families
[Explore the Adventures] [Download a Free Coloring Page]

Cover art: Sam and Robo sitting under a large oak tree, glowing book
open between them. Animals gather nearby. Warm golden light from the
book. Painterly children's illustration style, lush and inviting.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

## HERO

ALLEY KINGZ
Rule the Alley. Own the Arena.

Real-time PvP card battles set in the streets. Build your deck.
Challenge rivals. Climb the ranks. Collect and trade NFT cards
that hold real value. This is not a casual game -- this is war
on asphalt.

[Join the Waitlist] [Watch Trailer] (placeholder)

Visual: Dark urban alley at golden hour. Neon cyan signage. A character
in silhouette holds glowing cards. Crown Gold particle effects.
Cinematic, gritty, premium.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

## THE GAME

2-4 minute PvP battles. 8-card decks. Elixir economy. Tower destruction.
Think Clash Royale meets street culture -- rendered in hyper-real
urban art with PBR materials and cinematic lighting.

REAL-TIME PVP
Fast-paced head-to-head battles. Build your deck, manage your elixir,
deploy units, and destroy your opponent's towers to earn crowns.

COLLECT AND TRADE
Every card is a work of art. Hyper-real urban characters with
authentic streetwear, cinematic lighting, and detail that holds up
at any zoom level. Legendary cards are NFTs you actually own.

ADVANCE CONTRACTS
Our signature innovation. Get premium rewards upfront -- then prove
you earned them through skill and engagement. Complete the contract,
keep the loot. Fail, and you settle up. No dark patterns. Pure skill.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

## FACTIONS

TERRITORY KINGS
The enforcers. Broad builds, heavy hitters, control the map.
They hold ground and dare you to take it.

STREET CHEMISTS
The strategists. Lean, precise, deadly combos.
They win before you realize what happened.

GRID RUNNERS
The athletes. Fast, dynamic, hit-and-run.
They are everywhere and nowhere at once.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

## THE ART

Alley Kingz is hyper-real urban power -- cinematic street culture
rendered with Clash Royale clarity and Uncharted 4 texture fidelity.

Every character, card, and environment is built with:
- PBR materials (leather creases, gold catches light, concrete shows age)
- Golden hour + neon night lighting
- Culturally authentic streetwear and accessories
- Card art quality rivaling Hearthstone Legendary tier

This is not generic fantasy. This is Black urban America rendered
at AAA quality on a mobile canvas.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

## MONETIZATION (Player-Friendly)

SEASON PASS -- $7.99/season. Premium reward track.
VIP -- $4.99/month. Daily rewards, better contract terms.
GEM PACKS -- Hard currency for the shop.
ADVANCE CONTRACTS -- Settlement fees from failed contracts.

Rules we live by:
- Same prices for all players. No dynamic pricing.
- Base game is fully playable free-to-play.
- No hidden fees. No dark patterns. Clear value.
- Skill-based progression, not pay-to-win.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

## COMING SOON

Alley Kingz is in active development. Built in Unity with
blockchain-backed NFT card ownership.

[Your email] [Get Early Access]
Be first to play. Early access members get a free Legendary card drop.

## HERO

ONYX POS
The point-of-sale system that doesn't take a cut of your hustle.

Flat-rate pricing. No percentage fees. No contracts. Built by a small
business owner who got tired of watching Square skim profits off every swipe.

[Start Your Free 14-Day Trial]
No credit card required. Set up in under 10 minutes.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

## PAIN POINTS

You opened a business, not a payment processing degree program.

DEATH BY PERCENTAGE
Every swipe, tap, and scan -- Square takes 2.6% + 10 cents. On $30,000/month
in sales, that is $780+ gone before you pay rent. You earned it. Keep it.

SOFTWARE BUILT FOR CORPORATIONS
Most POS systems were designed for enterprise chains, then dumbed down and
resold to you at full price. Cluttered dashboards, features you will never use.

SUPPORT THAT DOES NOT EXIST
Something breaks on Saturday during your busiest hours. You submit a ticket.
You get an auto-reply. You wait. Nobody comes. That is abandonment.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

## FEATURES -- Everything you need. Nothing you don't.

1. INVENTORY MANAGEMENT -- Know what you have. Always.
   Real-time stock tracking, low-inventory alerts, supplier reorder points.

2. PAYMENT PROCESSING -- Flat-rate processing. Keep more of every sale.
   No percentage-based fees that scale against your growth.

3. EMPLOYEE MANAGEMENT -- Clock-ins, permissions, and accountability.
   Role-based access, time tracking, shift scheduling.

4. SALES ANALYTICS -- Data that actually helps you make decisions.
   Daily/weekly/monthly breakdowns. Exportable reports.

5. MULTI-LOCATION -- One dashboard. Every location.
   Unified inventory, consolidated reporting, per-location views.

6. MOBILE POS -- Ring up sales from anywhere in your store.
   Any tablet or phone becomes a checkout terminal.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

## PRICING

ONYX PRO -- $49/mo
Billed monthly. Cancel anytime. No contracts.

Includes:
- Unlimited transactions
- Up to 10 employee accounts

## FAQ

Q: How does pricing compare to Square or Toast?
A: Square charges 2.6% + $0.10 per transaction. On $30,000/month that is
~$780 in processing fees alone. Onyx is flat $49/month. More you sell,
more you save.

Q: What hardware do I need?
A: Any modern tablet, phone, or computer with a browser. Fully web-based.
Optional: receipt printers, barcode scanners, card readers.

Q: Can I migrate from my current POS?
A: Yes. CSV imports for products, customers, sales history. One-click
import templates for Square, Clover, Shopify POS.

Q: Is there a contract?
A: No. Month-to-month. Cancel from your dashboard. Zero fees, zero calls.

Q: What kind of support?
A: Email and live chat from real people. 2-hour response during business
hours. Full knowledge base with video walkthroughs.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

Stop overpaying. Start selling.
Join hundreds of small retailers who switched to Onyx and kept more
of what they earned. Set up takes less than 10 minutes.

PAGE 6: HIVE MIND (/hivemind)
Accent: Violet (#7C3AED)
======================================================================

## HERO

HIVE MIND
Stop using AI tools. Start running AI teams.

The orchestration layer that coordinates Claude, Gemini, Codex, and more --
as a unified workforce. One dashboard. Multiple AI agents. Human in the loop.

[Join the Waitlist]
Early access opening Q2 2026. Limited seats.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

## THE PROBLEM

You have AI tools. You do not have an AI team.

Right now you are the middleware. You copy a strategy from ChatGPT, paste
it into Claude for refinement, switch to Codex for implementation, then
manually track what happened where. You are managing four browser tabs,
three chat histories, and zero shared context.

Every AI starts from scratch. None of them remember what you decided
yesterday. You are coordinating brilliant specialists using sticky notes
and willpower. This does not scale.

Pain cards:
- NO SHARED MEMORY -- Your AIs forget everything between sessions.
- NO COORDINATION -- Claude doesn't know what Gemini built. You are the only bridge.
- NO SYSTEM -- You have tools, not a workflow. Every task is a manual hand-off.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

## THE PLATFORM

One command. Your entire AI team mobilizes.

WAR ROOM -- Multi-agent strategy sessions. Claude plans, Gemini executes,
Codex engineers, Perplexity researches. Debate logging and consensus scoring.

SMART ROUTER -- Describe what you need. The router classifies intent and
engages only the agents that matter. No wasted tokens.

TASKBOARD -- AI-to-human handoff. Every deliverable surfaces as an actionable
task. Approve, revise, or delegate.

NERVE CENTER -- Real-time system health. Which agents are active, what they
are working on, token usage, performance analytics.

CONTENT FACTORY -- Automated pipeline from ideation to distribution. Research,
draft, edit, format, publish -- with quality gates at every step.

PERSISTENT MEMORY -- Shared context across sessions and agents. Your AI team
remembers past decisions, ongoing projects, established preferences.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

## HOW IT WORKS

1. CONNECT YOUR AIs -- Bring your existing API keys. Hive Mind orchestrates
   them. Your models, your accounts, your data.

2. DEFINE YOUR WORKFLOWS -- Marketing to content team. Engineering to dev
   stack. Strategy convenes the full war room. Configure once, run forever.

3. LET THE HIVE WORK -- Issue a single command. Perplexity scouts intel.
   Router dispatches. Agents run in parallel, share context, converge results.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

## USE CASES

CONTENT AT SCALE -- Full pipeline from topic research to published article.
Perplexity sources trends, Claude drafts, Gemini handles production.

BUSINESS OPERATIONS -- Automate SOPs, financial analysis, vendor research.
Route operational questions to the right specialist agent.

CODE DEVELOPMENT -- Architecture reviews (Claude), implementation (Codex),
deployment (Gemini) in a single workflow.

MARKET INTELLIGENCE -- Real-time research (Perplexity), synthesis (Claude),
financial modeling (Codex). Three perspectives, one briefing.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

## EARLY ACCESS

Get in before the swarm goes live.

Hive Mind is in closed development. We are opening early access to solo
operators and small teams already running on AI who want to stop being
the middleware.

[your@email.com] [Request Early Access]
No spam. Early access members get founding pricing locked for life.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

## BUILT IN PUBLIC

This is not a pitch deck. This is a production system.

Hive Mind is the actual orchestration layer running Everlight Ventures today.
The founder uses this system to coordinate AI agents across trading, content,
SaaS development, and strategy -- every day, in production.

What you are signing up for is a productized version of a system that already
works. Not a concept. Not a roadmap. A working tool being packaged for
operators who think the same way.

We are building in public because the best proof of product-market fit is a
founder who refuses to work without their own product.


======================================================================
LOVABLE BUILD INSTRUCTIONS
======================================================================

RECOMMENDED APPROACH (from research):
1. Create ONE Lovable project for everlightventures.io
2. Use React Router for multi-page navigation (Lovable auto-generates this)
3. Prompt Lovable: "Create a multi-page app with tabs: Home, HIM Loadout,
   Logistics, Publishing, Alley Kingz, Onyx, Hive Mind. Use a shared dark
   layout with gold accent navigation."
4. Paste copy section by section into each page via Lovable chat
5. Connect custom domain after all pages are built

INTEGRATIONS TO CONNECT IN LOVABLE:
- Supabase: Required for Stripe + auth + form data storage
- Stripe: For Onyx POS trial signups and Hive Mind waitlist
- GitHub: Two-way code sync for version control
- Slack: Notifications when leads sign up
- ElevenLabs: For future audio/content features

DJANGO (PRIVATE OPS) CONNECTIONS:
- Lovable public site captures leads -> stored in Supabase
- Django funnel app syncs from Supabase (or direct API)
- Taskboard tracks all content/marketing tasks
- Nerve Center monitors everything

DNS SETUP:
1. In Lovable: Settings -> Domains -> Connect "everlightventures.io"
2. Copy the A record IP and TXT verification string
3. In Namecheap: Advanced DNS -> Add A record (@) and TXT record (@)
4. Delete any AAAA records
5. Wait for propagation (15-60 min usually)
6. Verify in Lovable -> domain goes Live with auto-SSL
